title: Velvety Saudia Chive Stir-fry
description: An earthy and velvety brunch-mood dish from Saudi Arabia featuring chives, simmered gently to create a rich, flavorful blend that's perfect for breakfast.

ingredients.name: 1 cup heavy cream or coconut milk (for non-dairy option)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and onion, cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in chives and lemon juice. Cook for another minute.
Pour in heavy cream or coconut milk and add salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer gently until the sauce thickens, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in saffron threads (if using). Let it sit for a few more minutes to infuse flavors.
If desired, sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
